ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended (e.g., Men, Women) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the measurement belongs to */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement template */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., length, shoulder, bust) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Log of changes made to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES measurement_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size FOREIGN KEY ("size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., UK 6, UK 8-10) */,
  "size_chart" TEXT /* Link to a size chart or additional sizing information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of products the template applies to */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "measurement_types" TEXT /* List of measurement types that are part of the template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_templates_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES products ("category")
)
